# KyvernLabs v0.2.0 — Complete Technical Reference

## What is KyvernLabs?

KyvernLabs is the business infrastructure layer for the x402 economy. Two products: Pulse (revenue analytics) and Vault (wallet management). Built for the x402 Foundation ecosystem (Coinbase, Cloudflare, Stripe, Google, Visa, Amazon, Microsoft, Solana, Mastercard, Shopify).

195+ x402 services, $600M+ volume, 119M+ transactions. Zero business tooling until KyvernLabs.

## Live URLs

- Website: https://kyvernlabs.com
- Pulse: https://kyvernlabs.com/pulse
- Vault: https://kyvernlabs.com/vault
- Services: https://kyvernlabs.com/services
- Dashboard: https://kyvernlabs.com/pulse/dashboard
- npm pulse: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@kyvernlabs/pulse
- npm mcp: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@kyvernlabs/mcp
- GitHub: https://github.com/shariqazeem/kyvernlabs

## Product 1: Pulse — Revenue Intelligence

### Architecture
```
Agent → x402 Endpoint → withPulse(withX402(handler)) → POST /api/pulse/ingest → SQLite → Dashboard
```

### npm Packages
- `@kyvernlabs/pulse` v0.1.0 — middleware: `withPulse(handler, { apiKey: 'kv_live_...' })`
- `@kyvernlabs/mcp` v0.2.0 — 17 tools for AI agents

### Authentication
- SIWE (Sign-In With Ethereum) → httpOnly session cookie → 7-day expiry
- API keys: `kv_live_` prefix, SHA-256 hashed, auto-generated on signup
- Multi-tenant: every query scoped to authenticated user's api_key_id

### Dashboard Pages (13)
1. Overview — stat cards, revenue chart, top endpoints/customers
2. Transactions — search, filter (source/status), pagination, CSV export
3. Endpoints — sortable columns, search, pagination, CSV export
4. Customers — sortable, search, pagination, CSV export
5. Benchmarks (Pro) — pricing vs market, percentile rank, distribution chart
6. Cohorts (Pro) — agent retention curves by first-seen week
7. Intelligence (Pro) — market-wide competitive data, category breakdown
8. Webhooks (Pro) — CRUD, HMAC-SHA256 signed, delivery logs, auto-disable at 10 failures
9. Alerts (Pro) — 5 types: revenue_drop, revenue_spike, new_agent, latency_spike, daily_target
10. API Keys — view, copy, manage kv_live_ keys
11. Setup Guide — middleware + MCP + direct API (3 paths)
12. Billing — plan comparison, upgrade CTA
13. Dark mode toggle (Sun/Moon/System)

### API Reference

Base URL: https://kyvernlabs.com/api

**Pulse Analytics (session auth):**
- GET /api/pulse/stats?range=7d — revenue, calls, customers, deltas, source_breakdown
- GET /api/pulse/endpoints — per-endpoint stats
- GET /api/pulse/customers?limit=20 — top agents
- GET /api/pulse/recent?limit=20&search=&source=&status=&offset= — transactions with search/filter/pagination
- GET /api/pulse/timeseries?range=7d — revenue over time
- GET /api/pulse/usage — tier usage (events, revenue, limits)
- GET /api/pulse/proof — public proof stats

**Pulse Ingest (API key auth):**
- POST /api/pulse/ingest — record x402 event (with tier enforcement + dedup)

**Pro Features (session auth, 403 for free):**
- GET /api/pulse/benchmarks — pricing benchmarks vs market
- GET /api/pulse/cohorts?periods=8 — retention cohort analysis
- GET /api/pulse/intelligence — competitive market intelligence
- GET /api/pulse/webhooks — CRUD webhooks
- GET /api/pulse/webhooks/deliveries?webhook_id= — delivery logs
- GET /api/pulse/alerts — CRUD alerts
- GET /api/pulse/export?type=transactions&range=7d — CSV export

**Auth:**
- GET /api/auth/nonce — SIWE nonce
- POST /api/auth/verify — verify SIWE, create account + session
- GET /api/auth/session — check session
- POST /api/auth/logout — clear session
- GET/POST /api/auth/keys — manage API keys

**x402 Services:**
- GET /api/x402/oracle?token=ETH — price oracle ($0.001/call)
- GET /api/x402/reputation?address=0x... — agent reputation ($0.01/call)
- GET /api/x402/price?symbol=ETH — demo price endpoint ($0.001/call)

**System:**
- GET /api/health — { status, version, timestamp, uptime_ms }
- GET /api/waitlist — waitlist count

## Product 2: Vault — Wallet Management

**Vault API:**
- GET /api/vault/wallets — list wallets with balances
- POST /api/vault/wallets — add wallet (auto-fetches on-chain balance)
- DELETE /api/vault/wallets?id= — remove wallet
- POST /api/vault/wallets/sync — sync all wallet balances

**Dashboard (/vault):**
- Portfolio overview (total USDC, total ETH, wallets monitored)
- Wallet table with live balances, purpose badges, low-funds alerts
- Add wallet form with address validation
- Sync all button for manual refresh

## MCP Server — 17 Tools

Analytics: pulse_get_stats, pulse_get_endpoints, pulse_get_customers, pulse_get_transactions, pulse_get_timeseries, pulse_ingest_event
Search: pulse_search_transactions, pulse_get_endpoint_detail, pulse_get_customer_detail
Pro: pulse_get_benchmarks, pulse_get_cohorts, pulse_get_alerts, pulse_create_alert, pulse_get_webhooks, pulse_get_market_intelligence
System: pulse_get_usage, pulse_health_check

## Tier Limits

Free: 1,000 events/day OR $10 revenue, 7-day retention, 1 API key, search + pagination + dark mode
Pro ($49 USDC/month): Unlimited, 90-day, 10 keys, benchmarks, cohorts, intelligence, alerts, webhooks, CSV export
Enterprise: Custom

## Tech Stack

Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS (dark mode), Framer Motion, Recharts
SQLite (better-sqlite3, WAL mode), wagmi, SIWE, viem, ethers
@x402/core, @x402/next, @x402/evm, @x402/fetch
Deployed: Ubuntu + nginx + PM2 + Let's Encrypt SSL

## Founder

Shariq Azeem (@shariqshkt) — 5 hackathon wins, deep x402 expertise, solo founder
